titlestmt.titleproper: Lloyd R. Simons Director of Extension papers21-24-108
titlestmt.author: Compiled by

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-11-05 23:07:06 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Lloyd R. Simons Director of Extension papers
did.abstract: Correspondence, scrapbooks, photoprints, publications, and other records of the Director of Extension of the New York State College of Agriculture at Cornell University.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Lloyd R. Simons Director of Extension papers, #21-24-108. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, scrapbooks, photoprints, publications, and other records of the Director of Extension of the New York State College of Agriculture at Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Typed manuscript of "The Extension Service Partnership with County Supporting Agencies," by Lloyd R. Simons (carbon copy), 113 pp.

controlaccess.subject: University extension -- New York (State)
Agricultural extension work -- New York (State)
